items.name: DashboardKit Free Admin Template
items.skill_usage_notes: Use the free Bootstrap and React folders as concrete references for responsive admin shells, sidebar navigation, KPI cards, ApexCharts dashboards, tables, forms, validation, copy-to-clipboard controls, and operational monitoring layouts. Reuse code only from the free repository version under MIT; ignore linked premium products and assets.

evidence.free_public: Repository README explicitly lists free Bootstrap and React versions.
evidence.license: Repository LICENSE contains the MIT License and grants use, modification, distribution, sublicensing, and sale rights with notice retention.
evidence.stack: react/package.json declares React 18, Vite, Bootstrap 5.3, React Bootstrap, ApexCharts, styled-components, Sass, React Router, and Yup.
